title: Extract Supplier Tables from PDFs: Automate Procurement Data Entry
metaTitle: Extract Supplier Tables from PDFs - Automate Procurement Data
metaDescription: Convert supplier PDFs to Excel spreadsheets automatically. Extract vendor pricing, contact info, and product tables with AI-powered accuracy.
h1: Extract Supplier Tables from PDFs with AI Automation

hero.headline: Turn Supplier PDFs into Structured Spreadsheets
hero.subheadline: Extract vendor pricing, contact details, and product tables from supplier documents automatically with AI-powered accuracy

summary: Procurement teams waste hours manually copying supplier information from PDF catalogs, price lists, and vendor forms into spreadsheets. AI-powered extraction converts supplier tables directly from PDFs to Excel files, capturing pricing data, contact information, and product specifications with 99%+ accuracy on clear documents.
whoItsFor: Procurement managers handling multiple supplier catalogs
Purchasing departments processing vendor price lists
Supply chain analysts comparing supplier data across vendors
whenThisIsRelevant: Processing supplier price lists and catalogs in PDF format
Updating vendor databases with new contact information
Comparing product specifications across multiple suppliers
supportedInputs: Supplier catalogs and price lists in PDF format
Vendor contact sheets and company profiles
Product specification documents with tabular data
expectedOutputs: Excel spreadsheets with supplier contact information
CSV files containing product pricing and specifications
commonChallenges: Manual data entry from supplier PDFs takes hours per document
Copy-paste errors lead to incorrect pricing or contact information
Different PDF layouts require reformatting for database imports
Scanned supplier documents need OCR before data extraction
howItWorksSteps: Upload supplier PDFs or drag-and-drop multiple vendor documents
AI identifies and extracts tables containing pricing, contacts, and product data
Review extracted fields and customize column mapping if needed
Download structured Excel or CSV files ready for procurement systems
whyPdfExcelAiFits: Handles both digital PDFs and scanned supplier documents with OCR
Batch processing for multiple vendor catalogs simultaneously
Custom field selection for specific supplier data requirements
99%+ accuracy on clear supplier documents with structured tables
limitations: Complex multi-page vendor catalogs may require manual review of extracted data
Handwritten supplier forms have limited recognition compared to printed documents
Heavily formatted or non-standard supplier layouts may need field customization

faq.question: Can it extract pricing tables from scanned supplier catalogs?
faq.answer: Yes, the OCR feature processes scanned supplier documents and photos, though accuracy depends on scan quality and text clarity.

faq.question: How accurate is extraction from vendor price lists?
faq.answer: Accuracy reaches 99%+ on clear, well-formatted supplier documents. Complex layouts or poor quality scans may require review.

faq.question: Does it work with different supplier document formats?
faq.answer: It processes PDF files, PNG images, JPEG images, and photos of supplier documents, handling various layouts with custom field mapping.

faq.question: Can I process multiple supplier catalogs at once?
faq.answer: Yes, batch processing allows you to upload multiple supplier documents simultaneously and extract data into organized spreadsheets.

trustSignals: Files encrypted during processing and automatically deleted afterward
99%+ accuracy rate on clear, well-formatted supplier documents
